description_long: This is a compact, box-shaped filing cabinet with a smooth, matte wood finish. The cabinet features two drawers, with the upper drawer partially open and the lower drawer closed, both seamlessly integrated into the main body. A single round knob handle is visible on the upper drawer, providing a simple and functional design. The cabinet's surfaces are flat and sturdy, suitable for supporting objects on top. The color is a muted grayish-brown, giving it a neutral and professional appearance. This type of cabinet is commonly found in offices or home workspaces for organizing documents and supplies.
description: A small, boxy filing cabinet with two drawers and a round knob handle, finished in matte grayish-brown wood.
description_view_0: Side view showing the upper drawer partially open and the cabinet's smooth, flat surface.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both drawers, with the upper drawer open and a round knob handle visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the upper drawer open, highlighting the cabinet's depth and solid construction.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned back panel with no visible handles or openings.
